message:
fix(output): remove redundant NO_COLOR env var check from OutputContext

The OutputMode selection logic was checking both the --no-color flag
AND the NO_COLOR environment variable separately. This is redundant
because clap already handles NO_COLOR via its built-in color control:
when NO_COLOR is set, clap propagates it to the color flag before
the OutputContext sees it. The explicit env::var("NO_COLOR") check
was therefore dead code that could never change the outcome.

Remove both instances (from the top-level path and the Text/Csv
format-specific path) to simplify the condition chain.

Cargo.lock updated for upstream memchr dependency in fsqlite-types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
